latin: Familia Atreides tandem ad planetam Arrakis pervenit. Arrakis erat mundus aridissimus ubi nulla aqua in superficie inveniebatur. harenae immensae sub sole ardenti iacebant. hic nascitur substantia pretiosissima quae 'melange' vocatur, sine qua naves inter stellas navigare non possunt. Paulus, cum primum desertum vidit, sensum mirum habuit — quasi iam hunc locum cognovisset.

questions.target: An extremely dry world with no surface water
choices: An extremely dry world with no surface water

questions.prompt: What precious substance came from Arrakis?
What did Paul feel when he first saw the desert?
questions.target: A strange feeling, as if he already knew the place
choices: Terror and a desire to flee
A strange feeling, as if he already knew the place

questions.target: Ships could not travel between stars without it
choices: Ships could not travel between stars without it
It was used to build weapons

translation: The Atreides family finally arrived at the planet Arrakis. Arrakis was an extremely dry world where no water was found on the surface. Immense sands lay under a blazing sun. Here grows the most precious substance called 'melange,' without which ships cannot travel between the stars. Paul, when he first saw the desert, had a strange feeling — as if he had already known this place.
